# YTOUDown — YouTube Video Downloader

> YTOUDown is a free, web-based YouTube video downloader. Paste a YouTube URL to download videos in 4K, 1080p, 720p, 480p, or as MP3/M4A audio. No account required. No ads.

## What YTOUDown Does

YTOUDown lets users download YouTube videos directly from their browser. Users paste a YouTube URL, the server fetches available formats via yt-dlp, the user selects a quality, and the server processes and serves the file for download.

Supported output formats: MP4 (H.264, VP9, AV1), WebM, M4A, MP3, Opus.
Supported resolutions: 144p, 240p, 360p, 480p, 720p, 1080p, 1440p, 4K (when available on the source video).

## Key Facts

- Free to use. No registration required.
- Powered by yt-dlp (open-source video downloader) and FFmpeg (media processing).
- Backend: Node.js + Express. Frontend: React + Vite + Tailwind CSS.
- Database: PostgreSQL (stores download history only).
- Downloads are server-side processed and temporarily stored; files expire after 1 hour.
- No advertising. No third-party tracking cookies.
- Download history is stored per-server (not tied to user accounts).

## Pages

- / — Home (downloader interface): paste URL, select format, download
- /history — Download history: view past downloads with stats
- /formats — Supported formats: full list of video/audio formats YTOUDown can produce
- /faq — FAQ: answers to 20 common questions about downloading YouTube videos
- /about — About: description of how YTOUDown works, technology used, and legal notice
- /privacy — Privacy Policy: what data is collected and how it is used
- /terms — Terms of Service: permitted and prohibited uses

## How to Download a YouTube Video with YTOUDown

1. Copy the YouTube video URL from your browser address bar.
2. Go to https://ytoudown.com
3. Paste the URL into the input field.
4. Click "Get Info" — the server fetches available formats.
5. Select a quality (e.g. 1080p MP4, or MP3 audio).
6. Click "Download" — the server processes the file.
7. When ready, click the download link to save the file.

## Frequently Asked Questions (Short Answers)

Q: Is YTOUDown free?
A: Yes. YTOUDown is completely free to use with no account required.

Q: What formats can I download?
A: MP4, WebM, M4A, MP3, Opus. Resolutions up to 4K depending on the source video.

Q: Can I download MP3 audio only?
A: Yes. Select an audio-only format (M4A or Opus) from the format list.

Q: How long does a download take?
A: Typically 30–90 seconds depending on video length and quality.

Q: Does YTOUDown support YouTube Shorts?
A: Yes. YouTube Shorts use standard YouTube URLs and are supported.

Q: Do I need to create an account?
A: No. YTOUDown works without any registration or login.

Q: Is downloading YouTube videos legal?
A: Downloading may violate YouTube's Terms of Service. YTOUDown is intended for personal, educational, and archival use with content you have rights to download.

Q: What technology powers YTOUDown?
A: yt-dlp (video extraction), FFmpeg (media processing), Node.js/Express (API), React/Vite (frontend), PostgreSQL (history).

## Technology

- yt-dlp: https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp
- FFmpeg: https://ffmpeg.org
- Node.js: https://nodejs.org
- React: https://react.dev

## Legal

YTOUDown is provided for personal, educational, and archival use only. Users are responsible for ensuring they have the right to download any content. See /terms and /privacy for full details.

## Contact

- Privacy: privacy@ytoudown.com
- Legal / DMCA: legal@ytoudown.com
